query: backlit silhouette obscured anonymous figure against bright window subject in shadow
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: backlit silhouette — anonymous figures, identity erased by exposure choice, sinister window-light contrejour

response.objective_caption: A person kneels in the center aisle of a church nave, facing a tall arched window at the far end. Rows of wooden pews line both sides of the diamond-patterned tile floor. The window is set within a large recessed Gothic arch flanked by columns, and light streams through it into the interior. The scene is rendered in black and white.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A person kneels in the center aisle of a church nave, rendered as a dark silhouette against a tall arched window at the far end that is deliberately overexposed to pure white. Rows of wooden pews line the diamond-patterned tile floor, but extreme underexposure crushes the surrounding walls, ceiling, and most architectural details into near-total blackness, creating a stark graphic composition where only the bright window, the figure's outline, and faint reflections on the floor remain visible.
